ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the player's profile */,
  "year_from" INTEGER /* Year the player started their college career */,
  "year_to" INTEGER /* Year the player finished their college career */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college the player attended */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "nbaID" INTEGER /* NBA identifier for the player */,
  "bbrID" TEXT /* Basketball Reference ID for the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_eligibility" TEXT /* Draft eligibility status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the college belongs to */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the college */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the college */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the college's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nba_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NBA team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the NBA team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City in which the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Current head coach of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player played for during that season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season identifier (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES nba_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player drafted */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the player was drafted */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was selected */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team that drafted the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the draft record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES nba_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_awarded" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the award record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Forward, Guard) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the position record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_colleges" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college */,
  "year_started" INTEGER /* Year the player started at the college */,
  "year_ended" INTEGER /* Year the player finished at the college */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mapping record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_colleges_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_colleges_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, scout, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
